revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-220

Referencing (in Decca)

The method incorporated in Decca navigator receivers of checking and adjusting so that unwanted phase shifts within the receiver are removed.

Reference: B.S.
